title: Senior Software Engineer - ECIL Holdings Services - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - ECIL Holdings Services - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at ECIL Holdings Services. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Software Engineer to strengthen our Lucknow-based team.

About ECIL Holdings Services:
ECIL Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Node.js

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ECIL Holdings Services!
